description: Wise is a financial service for international money transfers, multi-currency accounts, balances, and card-related payment operations. Its developer docs describe programmatic access to Wise Platform features for partners and certain Wise business accounts.
summary: Wise exposes one public REST API, the Wise Platform API at `https://api.wise.com`, authenticated with either OAuth 2.0 bearer tokens for partners or personal API tokens for Wise business accounts; no public GraphQL API, MCP server, or CLI was found on wise.com.
